'''âg-th-th''' ('''kagathath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pratfall|pratfall]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-th-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pratfall|pratfall]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-th-th
|-
! Lemma
| kagathath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigathath|thigathath]] || [[word:jigathath|jigathath]] || [[word:shigathath|shigathath]] || [[word:kigathath|kigathath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugathath|thuthugathath]] || [[word:jujugathath|jujugathath]] || [[word:shushugathath|shushugathath]] || [[word:kukugathath|kukugathath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugathath|thugathath]] || [[word:jugathath|jugathath]] || [[word:shugathath|shugathath]] || [[word:kugathath|kugathath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugathath|thugathath]] || [[word:jugathath|jugathath]] || [[word:shugathath|shugathath]] || [[word:kugathath|kugathath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegathath|thegathath]] || [[word:jegathath|jegathath]] || [[word:shegathath|shegathath]] || [[word:kegathath|kegathath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogathath|thothogathath]] || [[word:jojogathath|jojogathath]] || [[word:shoshogathath|shoshogathath]] || [[word:kokogathath|kokogathath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogathath|thogathath]] || [[word:jogathath|jogathath]] || [[word:shogathath|shogathath]] || [[word:kogathath|kogathath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogathath|thogathath]] || [[word:jogathath|jogathath]] || [[word:shogathath|shogathath]] || [[word:kogathath|kogathath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgathath|thĂŠgathath]] || [[word:jĂŠgathath|jĂŠgathath]] || [[word:shĂŠgathath|shĂŠgathath]] || [[word:kĂŠgathath|kĂŠgathath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagathath|thathagathath]] || [[word:jajagathath|jajagathath]] || [[word:shashagathath|shashagathath]] || [[word:kakagathath|kakagathath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagathath|thagathath]] || [[word:jagathath|jagathath]] || [[word:shagathath|shagathath]] || [[word:kagathath|kagathath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagathath|thagathath]] || [[word:jagathath|jagathath]] || [[word:shagathath|shagathath]] || [[word:kagathath|kagathath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagathath|shagathath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagathath|goshagathath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagathath|gokishagathath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagathathnĂŒ|shagathathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagathathnknĂŒ|goshagathathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagathathnĂŒ|gokishagathathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagathathshĂ«|shagathathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagathathnkshĂ«|goshagathathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagathathshĂ«|gokishagathathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagathathro|shagathathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagathathnkro|goshagathathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagathathro|gokishagathathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagathathmu|shagathathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagathathnkmu|goshagathathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagathathmu|gokishagathathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagathathsher|shagathathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagathathnksher|goshagathathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagathathsher|gokishagathathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagathathng|shagathathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagathathnkng|goshagathathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagathathng|gokishagathathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagathathya|shagathathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagathathnkya|goshagathathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagathathya|gokishagathathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagathathyam|shagathathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagathathnkyam|goshagathathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagathathyam|gokishagathathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagathathnĂŒshĂ«|shagathathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagathathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshagathathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagathathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishagathathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagathathnĂŒro|shagathathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagathathnknĂŒro|goshagathathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagathathnĂŒro|gokishagathathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagathathnĂŒmu|shagathathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagathathnknĂŒmu|goshagathathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagathathnĂŒmu|gokishagathathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagathathshĂ«nĂŒ|shagathathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagathathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshagathathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagathathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishagathathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagathathshĂ«ro|shagathathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagathathnkshĂ«ro|goshagathathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagathathshĂ«ro|gokishagathathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagathathshĂ«mu|shagathathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagathathnkshĂ«mu|goshagathathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagathathshĂ«mu|gokishagathathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagathathronĂŒ|shagathathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagathathnkronĂŒ|goshagathathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagathathronĂŒ|gokishagathathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagathathroshĂ«|shagathathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagathathnkroshĂ«|goshagathathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagathathroshĂ«|gokishagathathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagathathromu|shagathathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagathathnkromu|goshagathathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagathathromu|gokishagathathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagathathmunĂŒ|shagathathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagathathnkmunĂŒ|goshagathathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagathathmunĂŒ|gokishagathathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagathathmushĂ«|shagathathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagathathnkmushĂ«|goshagathathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagathathmushĂ«|gokishagathathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagathathmuro|shagathathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagathathnkmuro|goshagathathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagathathmuro|gokishagathathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
